channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 21st March
item.description:
Rubbish bags dumped
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-Lime Bikes Park in Overcrowding Parking Bay., 21st March
item.description:
E-Lime Bikes Park in Overcrowding Parking Bay. Overloaded hire bikes parked dangerously blocking the road and pavement opposite Hippodrome Casino at Little Newport Street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Little Newport Street, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge on pavement, 21st March
item.description:
Fridge dumped on pavement adjacent to site of the demolished Parkside Community Centre

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Cross, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Iberflowing, 21st March
item.description:
Bin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Towpath Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle with no registration plates illegally parked on road, 21st March
item.description:
Looks like this car has been stolen. Is currently parked just off the kerb by Rustico restaurant.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging tree causing pressure to fence and danger to my toddler who kept putting the acorn things in her mouth, 21st March
item.description:
It drops its acorn things the whole summer. I have a toddler who would constantly pick them up and put them in her mouth last summer, it over hangs into mine and my neighbours garden, it puts pressure on the fence. Peabody are saying it isn’t their issue

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Miles Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 21st March
item.description:
Abandoned vehicle occupying parking space in Woodstock Gardens

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodstock Gardens, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog mess, 21st March
item.description:
Dog poo potential dropped from the balcony , this is a public path way. Outside main door of laurel apartments.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Townsend Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Empty Boxes pile at Chaumert Road Peckham Rye Lane., 21st March
item.description:
Shopkeepers throw empty fruits and vegetables boxes at Chaumert Road Near KK Butchers.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Choumert Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By BT box on Claremont road junction with Kilburn lane, 21st March
item.description:
Dumped wood

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Broken glass over pavement, 21st March
item.description:
Lots of small shards all over the corner for a good few days now. Dangerous for animals and children walking to school
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Avery Hill Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus time table, 21st March
item.description:
Sanford street Remove graffiti from bus time table

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sanford Street, New Cross Gate, Greater London

item.title: Inappropriate graffiti on path, 21st March
item.description:
Inappropriate graffiti on path. What3words ///vision.quiet.mime Coordinates (51.5005999, 0.1155844)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eastern Way, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped carpet on road verge nr 140 and Xmas tree nr 130, 21st March
item.description:
Rolled up carpet has been there some while - Xmas tree has been there since January.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meadowview Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three big holes due to missing drain cover, 21st March
item.description:
It is dangerous for pedestrians as you can put your while foot in the holes, and there is more than one in a very busy pavement during weekends when you can’t even see the floor in front of you. You can even fall on the road where traffic is busy too.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich Church Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken padlock, 21st March
item.description:
Someone has prised and broken the padlock on the secure gate to the Craydene Open Space A resident has place a small bike lock on it so the gate looks secure we are worried that cars will drive onto the field or caravans might set up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Craydene Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned traffic management kit, 21st March
item.description:
Trench cover. Cones. Footpath closed signage. Road works warning triangle. Unmarked. No works here for several months. .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bickley Crescent, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights

item.description:
Fly tipping large amounts of clothing
